CHITTI.DocsAPI Reference
GitHub

Student App APIs

This documentation provide s an overview of the functionalities for APIs related to the Student Application.

Public APIs​

Health API​

Method: GET
Path: /health
Description: Verifies the health of the CHITTI. backend and acts as the primary source of verification if its an external failure of the backend as a monolothic layer is failing together.
Response Code: 200
Response Body: The backend is live 💓 - Chitti: Your last min prep buddy!!

Authentication​

Sign In [DEPRECATED]​

Method: POST
Path: /auth/sign-in
Description: Authenticates a user and returns a Firebase custom token. Checks if the roll number exists, validates credentials, and handles device ID verification.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "X-FCM-Token": "string"
}

Request Body:

{
  "roll_number": "string",
  "password": "string"
}

Response:

  • Successful Sign in200
  • Invalid request400
  • Another Device Exists403
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Sign-in successful",
  "token": "string",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "name": "string"
  }
}
{
  "message": "Roll number is required",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Another device already exists, request for a revoke of your current device.",
  "status": false,
  "revokes_left": 3,
  "reset_token": "eyJhY2NvdW50X3Rva2VuIjo...",
  "error_code": "auth/device-exists"
}

JWT for reset_token:

{
  "user_id": "221203XXXX", 
  "device_id_attempted": "new_device_uuid_9999",
  "exp": 1789945200 
}

    {
      "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
      "status": false,
      "error_code": "auth/internal-error"
    }

Sign in With OAuth (Google/Apple)​

Method: POST
Path: /auth/oauth
Description: Authenticates a user with an external oauth provider like Google or Apple and returns a Firebase custom token. Checks if the user exists, validates credentials, and handles device ID verification. It also replaces the deprecated internal-login API as this API also works with Admins, Instructors and Staff.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "X-FCM-Token": "string"
}

Request Body:

{
  "provider": "string",
  "id_token": "string"
}

Response:

  • Successful Sign in200
  • Invalid request400
  • Another Device Exists403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Sign-in successful",
  "token": "string",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "name": "string"
  }
}
{
  "message": "ID Token is required",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Another device already exists, request for a revoke of your current device.",
  "status": false,
  "revokes_left": 3,
  "reset_token": "eyJhY2NvdW50X3Rva2VuIjo...",
  "error_code": "auth/device-exists"
}

JWT for reset_token:

{
  "user_id": "221203XXXX", 
  "device_id_attempted": "new_device_uuid_9999",
  "exp": 1789945200 
}

    {
      "message": "User hasn't been signed-up on our platform.",
      "token":"string",
      "status": false,
      "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
    }
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/internal-error"
}

Sign Up​

Method: POST
Path: /auth/sign-up
Description: Creates a new user account and returns student details.
Request Headers:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "X-FCM-Token": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey........"
}

Request Body:

{
  "name": "string",
  "semester": "string",
  "branch": "string",
  "organization": "string"
}

Response:

  • Successful Sign up200
  • Invalid request400
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Sign up successful",
  "status": true
}
{
  "message": "Semester is required/Organization not supported yet.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/internal-error"
}

Revoke Device ID​

Method: PATCH
Path: /auth/device/reset
Description: Revokes a user's device ID, preventing them from logging in on that device.
Request Headers:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z"
}

Request Body:

{
  "reset_token": "eyJhY2NvdW50X3Rva2VuIjo..."
}

Response:

  • Successful Sign up200
  • Invalid request400
  • Revokes Exhausted403
  • User Not Found404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "XYZ's device ID has been revoked.",
  "status": true
}
{
  "message": "Malformed payload",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "No revokes left. Please request for a revoke.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/revokes-exhausted"
}
{
  "message": "User not found.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/internal-error"
}

Request Revoke Device ID​

Method: POST
Path: /auth/device-revokes
Description: Request the user's for a specific reason for requesting the revoke to a new device ID.
Request Headers:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z"
}

Request Body:

{
  "reset_token": "eyJhY2NvdW50X3Rva2VuIjo...",
  "reason": "string"
}

Response:

  • Successful Sign up200
  • Invalid request400
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Your request to revoke your device has been submitted successfully",
  "status": true
}
{
  "message": "Reason is required",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/internal-error"
}

Fetch Profile​

Method: GET
Path: /auth/profile/:role
Description: Fetch the user profile for the specific role specified.
Path Params:
role: The role for which the profile is requested, i.e, ADMIN, STAFF, INSTRUCTOR, or STUDENT.
Request Headers:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Response:

  • Instructor Profile200
  • Profile Fetched200
  • Mismatched role for user403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Profile fetched successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "roll_number": "string",
    "username": "string",
    "bio": "string",
    "assigned_courses": [
      {
        "instructor_id": "string",
        "course_id": "string",
        "roles": "string",
        "is_lead": true
      }
    ],
    "email": "string",
    "name": "string",
    "semester": 7,
    "branch": null,
    "gpa": null,
    "sgpa": null,
    "image": "string",
    "user_role": ["INSTRUCTOR"]
  }
}
{
  "message": "Profile fetched successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "roll_number": "string",
    "username": "string",
    "email": "string",
    "name": "string",
    "semester": 7,
    "branch": null,
    "gpa": null,
    "sgpa": null,
    "image": "string",
    "user_role": ["STUDENT"]
  }
}
{
  "message": "Student is not a ....",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/unauthorized"
}
{
  "message": "User not found",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/internal-error"
}

Edit Profile​

Method: PATCH
Path: /auth/profile
Description: Edit the user's profile, especially, their name, profile picture, organization, branch, semester, or bio.
Request Headers:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Request Body:

{
  "name": "string",
  "image_url": "string",
  "bio": "string",
  "organization": "string",
  "branch": "string",
  "semester": 7
}

Response:

  • Successful Sign up200
  • Invalid request400
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Profile updated successfully",
  "status": true
}
{
  "message": "Image URL is required./Organization not supported",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/internal-error"
}

[ADMIN] Fetch Token​

Method: POST
Path: /auth/token-exchange/:user_id
Description: Exchange a Firebase ID token for the given user ID. Should be only used by admins for token exchange.
Path Params:
user_id: The user id to generate the Firebase ID token

Request Headers:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Internal-Secret": "ey...."
}

Response:

  • Successful Sign up200
  • Invalid request400
  • Unauthorized403
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Fetched Firebase ID token successfully",
  "status": true,
  "token": "ey..."
}
{
  "message": "Misformed payload",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Unauthorized",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/unauthorized"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/internal-error"
}

Commerce​

Get Enrollments [DEPRECATED]​

Method: GET
Path: /commerce/enrollments
Description: Retrives all of the enrollments linked for a specific user, which includes information whether he has subscribed for a specific course, which plan did he choose, his progress, etc.\

Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Enrollments fetched successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "enrollment_id": 1,
      "student_id": "string",
      "course_id": "string",
      "progress": 20,
      "subscription": 1,
      "expires_at": "Date",
      "enrolled_at": "Date",
      "updated_at": "Date"
    }
  ]
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Couldn't fetch enrollments. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "enrollments/internal-error"
}

Get Cart​

Method: GET
Path: /commerce/cart
Description: Retrives the cart linked for a specific user.\

Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Cart fetched successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "course_id": "string",
      "subscription_type": 1
    }
  ]
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Couldn't fetch cart. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/internal-error"
}

Add To Cart​

Method: PATCH
Path: /commerce/cart
Description: Adds an item to the cart linked for a specific user.\

Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Request Body:

{
  "course_id": "string",
  "subscription_type": 1
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Malformed Payload400
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Item added to cart successfully",
  "status": true
}
{
  "message": "Malformed payload.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Couldn't add item to cart. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/internal-error"
}

Apply Coupon​

Method: POST
Path: /commerce/cart/coupons
Description: Applies a coupon(s) to the cart linked for a specific user.\

Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Request Body:

{
  "coupon_code": "string"
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Malformed Payload400
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Coupon doesn't exist404
  • Coupon not applicable422
  • Coupon not active422
  • Coupon not applicable422
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Coupon applied to cart successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "name": "string",
    "code": "string",
    "discount": 20,
    "discount_type": "DiscountType.fixed"
  }
}
{
  "message": "Malformed payload.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Coupon doesn't exists.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/coupon-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Coupon expired.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/coupon-expired"
}
{
  "message": "Coupon not valid yet.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/coupon-not-active"
}
{
  "message": "Cart value is less than minimum required.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/coupon-not-applicable"
}
{
  "message": "Couldn't apply coupon to cart. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/internal-error"
}

Initiate Payment​

Method: POST
Path: /commerce/payments:initiate
Description: Initiates a payment for the cart linked for a specific user and also creating a pending status item in the Firebase Realtime DB.\

Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Cart is empty422
  • Coupon not applicable422
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Payment has been initiated successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "terms": true,
    "status": "PaymentStatus.PENDING",
    "amount": 100,
    "items": [
      {
        "course_id": "string",
        "subscription_type": 1
      }
    ],
    "created_at": "Date",
    "payment_id": "string",
    "razorpay_id": "string",
    "coupon_code": "string",
    "user_id": "string"
  }
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Cart is empty",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/no-items"
}
{
  "message": "Cart has a coupon applied which is not valid.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/coupon-not-applicable"
}
{
  "message": "Couldn't initiate payment from cart. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/internal-error"
}

Get Offers​

Method: GET
Path: /commerce/offers
Description: Retrives all of the offers available and active.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string"
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Offers fetched successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "offer_id": "string",
      "offer_type": "OfferType.SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE",
      "title": "string",
      "condition_count": 0,
      "coupon_code": "string",
      "coupon": {
        "name": "string",
        "code": "string",
        "discount": 0,
        "discount_type": "DiscountType.PERCENTAGE",
        "max_discount": 0,
        "min_amount": 0,
        "valid_from": "Date",
        "expiry_date": "Date"
      },
      "valid_from": "Date",
      "expiry_date": "Date",
      "created_at": "Date",
      "updated_at": "Date"
    }
  ]
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "cart/internal-error"
}

Get Payments​

Method: GET
Path: /commerce/payments
Description: Retrives all of the payments made by a user.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Payments fetched successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "status": "PaymentStatus.SUCCESS",
      "amount": 100,
      "created_at": "Date",
      "payment_id": "string"
    }
  ]
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payments/internal-error"
}

Get Payment by Payment ID​

Method: GET
Path: /commerce/payments/:payment_id
Description: Retrives the complete details of a payment made by a user for the given payment ID.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Path Params:
payment_id: the unique ID of the payment

Response:

  • Success200
  • Invalid request400
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Payment doesn't exist404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Payment details for given payment ID fetched successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "terms": true,
    "status": "PaymentStatus.SUCCESS",
    "amount": 100,
    "items": [
      {
        "course_id": "string",
        "subscription_type": 1
      }
    ],
    "created_at": "Date",
    "payment_id": "string",
    "razorpay_id": "string",
    "coupon_code": "string",
    "payment_method": "string",
    "payment_method_details": {
      "vpa": "string",
      "card_details": "0004"
    },
    "user_id": "string"
  }
}
{
  "message": "Payment ID is required",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Payment doesn't exists for the resource ID requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payments/order-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payments/internal-error"
}

Get Banners​

Method: GET
Path: /commerce/banners
Description: Retrieves all active banners for the application.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string"
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "status": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "banner_id": "string",
      "image_url": "string",
      "action_url": "string",
      "is_active": true,
      "created_at": "Date"
    }
  ]
}
{
  "message": "Could not fetch banners.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "banners/internal-server-error"
}

Razorpay Gateway​

Checkout​

Method: POST
Path: /commerce/payments:checkout
Description: Checkout a Razorpay order for an existing payment record.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Request Body:

{
  "payment_id": "string"
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Invalid request400
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Payment Not Found404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Razorpay order created successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "order_XXXXX",
    "entity": "order",
    "amount": 10000, //in paise
    "currency": "INR",
    "receipt": "payment_id_string",
    "status": "created",
    "created_at": "Date"
  }
}
{
  "message": "Payment ID is required.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Unauthorized. This payment does not belong to user requesting to checkout this payment.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/unauthorized"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Payment not found",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payments/not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Failed to create Razorpay order",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "razorpay/error"
}

Webhook​

Method: POST
Path: /commerce/webhooks/razorpay
Description: Handles webhook events from Razorpay for payment status updates (e.g. payment.captured, payment.failed). Validates the payload signature and processes the payment.
Request Header:

{
  "X-Razorpay-Signature": "string"
}

Request Body: (Dynamic payload from Razorpay containing the event type and payload object)

Response:

  • Payment Successful200
  • Payment Failed402
  • Invalid Request400
  • Invalid Signature422
  • Payment Not Found404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Payment successful",
  "status": true
}
{
  "message": "Payment unsuccessful",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payments/user-cancelled"
}
{
  "message": "Payment ID is required.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Invalid Webhook signature.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/invalid-signature"
}
{
  "message": "Payment is not found.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payments/not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal server error. Actual cause of the error.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payments/internal-error"
}

Activities​

List Activities​

Method: GET
Path: /activities
Description: Retrieves a list of recent activities for the authenticated student. Optionally filter by course.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Query Params:
course_id (optional): Filter activities by a specific course ID.

  • Success200
  • Unauthorized403
  • Unexpected Error500

  "data": [
    {
      "activity_id": 1,

      "course_id": "string",

      "topic_id": "string",
      "resource_id": "string",
      "resource_type": "string",
      "created_at": "Date",
      "updated_at": "Date"
    }
  ]
}
{

  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "Could not fetch activities.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "activities/internal-server-error"
}

Record Activity​

{

  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."

{

  "topic_id": "string",
  "resource_id": "string",
  "resource_type": "string",
  "resource_name": "string"

search_query: search term for names.

  • User doesn't exist404

{
  "status": true,
  "message": "Students fetched successfully.",
  "data": [
    {
      "roll_number": "string",
      "name": "string",
      "username": "string",
      "semester": 0,
      "branch": "string",
      "email": "string",
      "gpa": 0,
      "sgpa": 0,
      "bio": "string (Instructor specific)",
      "assigned_courses": [
        {
          "instructor_id": "string",
          "course_id": "string",
          "roles": [
            "InstructorRole (e.g., 'CONTENT_VALIDATOR')"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "image": "string (URL)",
      "user_role": [
        "UserRole.STUDENT"
      ],
      "badges": [
        {
          "id": "string",
          "name": "string",
          "description": "string",
          "image": "string (URL)",
          "unlocked_at": "Date"
        }
      ],
      "courses": [
        {
          "progress": 0,
          "subscription": 0,
          "enrolled_at": "Date",
          "course_id": "string",
          "title": "string",
          "description": "string",
          "category": "string",
          "image": "string (URL)",
          "icon": 61239
        }
      ],
      "is_following": false,
      "followers_sample": [
        {
          "name": "string",
          "username": "string or null",
          "image": "string (URL)"
        }
      ],
      "_count": {
        "followers": 0,
        "following": 0
      }
    }
  ]
}
{
  "message": "No user IDs or search query provided.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",

  "data": {
    "chat_id": "string"
  }
}
{
  "message": "Missing required fields to create chat room.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "chat/internal-error"
}

Get Chat Details​

Method: GET
Path: /betachat/:chatId
Description: Retrieve chat room metadata.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Invalid Request400
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Chat Not Found404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Chat details fetched successfully.",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "string",
    "name": "string",
    "isGroup": false,
    "avatarUrl": "string",
    "lastMessage": "string",
    "lastMessageTime": "Date",
    "unreadCount": 0,
    "participants": [
      {
        "id": "string",
        "name": "string",
        "image": "string"
      }
    ]
  }
}
{
  "message": "Malformed payload.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Chat not found",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "chat/not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "chat/internal-error"
}

Get Messages​

Method: GET
Path: /betachat/:chatId/messages
Description: Retrieve messages for a specific chat room.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Invalid Request400
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Chat Not Found404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Messages fetched successfully.",
  "status": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "string",
      "text": "string",
      "senderId": "string",
      "timestamp": "Date",
      "senderName": "string",
      "isMe": false
    }
  ]
}
{
  "message": "Malformed payload.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Chat not found",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "chat/not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "chat/internal-error"
}

Send Message​

Method: POST
Path: /betachat/:chatId/messages
Description: Send a message to a chat room.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Request Body:

{
  "text": "string"
}

Response:

  • Success201
  • Invalid Request400
  • Unauthorized403
  • User doesn't exist404
  • Chat Not Found404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Message sent successfully.",
  "status": true
}
{
  "message": "Message text is required.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "User doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/user-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Chat not found",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "chat/not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "chat/internal-error"
}

Get App Version​

Method: GET
Path: /version
Description: Fetch the latest app version and update URL for a specific platform.
Query Params:
platform: The platform (android, macos, windows, ios).

Response:

  • Success200
  • Unsupported Platform400
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Version fetched successfully.",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "version": "5.0.7",
    "supportedVersions": ["5.0.7"],
    "updateUrl": "https://..."
  }
}
{
  "message": "Unsupported platform.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/unsupported-platform"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "version/internal-error"
}

Courses & Learning​

Get Course Details​

Method: GET
Path: /course/:courseId/
Description: Get course details including units, topics, and resources. Pricing will be overridden by the gold price if available. Delivers course outline and index structure.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Unauthorized403
  • Not Found404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Course structure indexed successfully.",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "course_id": "string",
    "units": [
      {
        "course_id": "string",
        "unit_id": "string",
        "name": "string",
        "description": "string",
        "unit_index": 1,
        "total_resources": 0,
        "topics": [
          {
            "topic_id": "string",
            "name": "string",
            "topic_index": 1,
            "difficulty": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "pricing": []
  }
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "Course not found.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "course/not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Couldn't fetch course outline.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "course/internal-server-error"
}

Get Feedback​

Method: GET
Path: /course/:course_id/feedback
Description: Retrives all of the feedback written for a specific course by all the users.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string"
}

Path Params:
course_id: the unique ID of the course

Response:

  • Success200
  • Invalid request400
  • Course doesn't exist404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Feedback for course CSEN2011 fetched successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "course_id": "string",
      "rating": 3,
      "review": "string",
      "created_at": "Date",
      "feedback_id": "string",
      "student_id": "string"
    }
  ]
}
{
  "message": "Course ID is required",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Course doesn't exists for the resource requested.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "course/course-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "course/internal-error"
}

Share Feedback​

Method: POST
Path: /course/:course_id/feedback
Description: Creates a new feedback entry written for a specific course by the user.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Path Params:
course_id: the unique ID of the course

Request Body:

{
  "rating": 4,
  "review": "string"
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Invalid request400
  • Course doesn't exist404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Feedback for course CSEN2011 saved successfully",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "course_id": "string",
    "rating": 3,
    "review": "string",
    "created_at": "Date",
    "feedback_id": "string",
    "student_id": "string"
  }
}
{
  "message": "Course ID is required",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "payload/misformed-payload"
}
{
  "message": "Course doesn't exists for the processing the request.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "course/course-not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Internal Server Error. Failed to save feedback. Actual cause of the error",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "course/internal-error"
}

Fetch Unit Hydration​

Method: GET
Path: /course/:courseId/units/:unit_id
Description: Hydrate unit details including topics, videos, notes, important questions, and cheatsheets. If topics are restricted, cheatsheet will be masked to null and is_restricted will be true.
Request Header:

{
  "X-App-Version": "X.Y.Z",
  "X-Device-Id": "string",
  "Authorization": "Bearer ey..."
}

Response:

  • Success200
  • Unauthorized403
  • Not Found404
  • Unexpected Error500
{
  "message": "Unit environment fully hydrated.",
  "status": true,
  "data": {
    "unit_id": "string",
    "is_restricted": false,
    "cheatsheet": [
      {
        "cheatsheet_id": "string",
        "url": "string",
        "course_id": "string",
        "unit_id": "string"
      }
    ],
    "topics": [
      {
        "topic_id": "string",
        "videos": [
          {
            "video_id": "string",
            "name": "string",
            "thumbnail": "string",
            "url": "string",
            "course_id": "string",
            "topic_id": "string",
            "unit_id": "string"
          }
        ],
        "notes": [
          {
            "notes_id": "string",
            "url": "string",
            "course_id": "string",
            "topic_id": "string",
            "unit_id": "string"
          }
        ],
        "important_questions": [
          {
            "iq_id": "string",
            "question": "string",
            "answer": "string",
            "difficulty": "string",
            "course_id": "string",
            "topic_id": "string",
            "unit_id": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
{
  "message": "Forbidden. Invalid token.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "auth/invalid-token"
}
{
  "message": "Unit resource context not found.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "units/not-found"
}
{
  "message": "Failed to hydrate target unit context.",
  "status": false,
  "error_code": "units/hydration-failed"
}

Parameters Table​

Parameter NameLocationDescription
courseIdPathThe unique identifier of the course for retrieving course/topic/resource details.
unitIdPathThe unique identifier of the unit for retrieving topics.
topicIdPathThe unique identifier of the topic for retrieving resources by type.

Request Body Table​

Field NameTypeDescription
rollNoStringUser's roll number for authentication.
passStringUser's password for authentication.
deviceIdStringThe device ID used for device verification.
nameStringUser's name for registration.
semesterNumberUser's current semester for registration.
coursesArrayList of course IDs for registration.
scheduleStringUser's schedule information for registration.
subIdNumberSubscription ID for registration.
resourceIdStringThe identifier of the completed resource to add.
userIdStringUser's Id for Razorpay payment creation.
courseIdStringThe Course ID to which the user is subscribing.
amountNumberThe amount for the Razorpay order.
receiptStringReceipt for the Razorpay order.
orderIdStringRazorpay Order ID to Verify Payment.
paymentIdStringRazorpay Payment ID to Verify Payment.
signatureStringRazorpay signature to Verify Payment.
